column1: # NANOGrav 15-year Power Spectral Density Sensitivity (characteristic strain)
# Source: Approximate digitization of Agazie et al. 2023
# Column 1: frequency_hz  — gravitational-wave frequency in Hz
# Column 2: h_c_characteristic_strain  — characteristic strain sensitivity sqrt(f * S_h(f))
# Notes: These are approximate values suitable for visualization / pedagogical use.
#        Values below ~1e-9 Hz and above ~1e-7 Hz are outside the reliable range
#        and should be treated as extrapolations.
